# zendesk_user (Data Source)

Look up an existing Zendesk user by ID or email address.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `email` (String) The email address of the user. Provide either id or email.
- `id` (String) The ID of the user. Provide either id or email.

### Read-Only

- `active` (Boolean)
- `alias` (String)
- `custom_role_id` (Number)
- `default_group_id` (Number)
- `details` (String)
- `external_id` (String)
- `locale` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `notes` (String)
- `only_private_comments` (Boolean)
- `organization_id` (Number)
- `phone` (String)
- `restricted_agent` (Boolean)
- `role` (String)
- `signature` (String)
- `suspended` (Boolean)
- `ticket_restriction` (String)
- `time_zone` (String)
- `verified` (Boolean)
